primary_cdc_lyme.title: CDC Lyme Disease Surveillance Data
primary_cdc_lyme.description: National yearly, state, and CSV downloads for cases 1996-2023

primary_cdc_lyme.title: CDC Lyme Disease Case Maps
primary_cdc_lyme.description: County-level dot maps for 1995, 2010, 2023 and 2023 county CSV with historical columns

primary_cdc_lyme.title: CDC MMWR: Surveillance for Lyme Disease After Implementation of a Revised Case Definition — United States, 2022
primary_cdc_lyme.description: 2022 case counts, incidence changes, high-incidence jurisdictions

primary_cdc_lyme.title: CDC Lyme Disease Facts and Statistics / Index
primary_cdc_lyme.description: Overview, 89,000+ cases in 2023, links to data

cdc_alpha_gal.title: Geographic Distribution of Suspected Alpha-gal Syndrome Cases — United States, 2017–2022
cdc_alpha_gal.description: 90,018 positive tests 2017-2022, yearly breakdown, geographic (county-level rates), demographics, methodology (Eurofins Viracor lab data)

cdc_alpha_gal.title: CDC About Alpha-gal Syndrome
cdc_alpha_gal.description: >110,000 suspected cases 2010-2022, estimate up to 450,000 affected

massachusetts_dph.title: Massachusetts Tick-borne Disease Surveillance Summaries and Data
massachusetts_dph.description: 10-year morbidity report, yearly Lyme cases 2015-2026 YTD, surveillance changes noted, annual reports 2019-2025

nantucket_and_local.title: Reports of Lyme disease in Nantucket County, Massachusetts (tickcheck.com / CDC data)
nantucket_and_local.description: Yearly confirmed cases 2000-2020 (723 total), sourced from CDC surveillance

nantucket_and_local.title: Nantucket Cottage Hospital / Town of Nantucket Ticks Page
nantucket_and_local.description: Local context, links to infectious disease reports

nantucket_and_local.title: Phillips et al. (2001) - Lyme disease and preventive behaviors in residents of Nantucket Island

johns_hopkins.title: Johns Hopkins Lyme and Tickborne Diseases Dashboard / Tracker
johns_hopkins.description: Interactive maps, data explorer, county-level visualizations, references to CDC data

johns_hopkins.title: Johns Hopkins Lyme Disease Page
johns_hopkins.description: ~500,000 diagnosed/treated per year estimates, geographic expansion info

literature_and_other.title: Mead et al. (2024) - Lyme Disease Surveillance and Epidemiology in the United States
Kugeler et al. (2021) - Estimating the Frequency of Lyme Disease Diagnoses, United States, 2010-2018
ArcGIS Hub - Reported Cases of Lyme Disease by County of Residence Map, United States (2000-2020)
Various MMWR and Statista references for incidence rates and historical summaries
literature_and_other.url: Multiple (e.g., https://www.cdc.gov/mmwr/, Statista Lyme incidence by state)

web_search_and_browse_sources: web:31 to web:74 from initial and follow-up searches (CDC pages, MMWR, mass.gov, PubMed, JHU, etc.)
Specific browsed URLs: surveillance-data-1.html, lyme-disease-case-map.html, mm7230a2.htm, mass.gov tickborne lists, tickcheck.com Nantucket page

historical_tick_distribution.title: Spatial Distribution of Counties in the Continental United States With Records of Occurrence of Amblyomma americanum (Ixodida: Ixodidae)
historical_tick_distribution.authors: Yuri P. Springer, Lars Eisen, Lorenza Beati, Angela M. James, Rebecca J. Eisen
historical_tick_distribution.description: Compilation of 18,121 collection records (1898–2012) with county-level classifications as 'established' or 'reported'. Includes decadal and cumulative maps. Best publicly available historical county-level data for Lone Star tick distribution. Used for future time-dynamic versions of the purple Verified Tick Population layer.

expanded_surveillance_2015_2025.title: County-Level Distribution of Ixodes scapularis and Ixodes pacificus — United States, 2015
expanded_surveillance_2015_2025.description: National county-level maps of established and reported blacklegged tick populations. Strong candidate for expanding the Ixodes portion of the purple density layer.

expanded_surveillance_2015_2025.title: CDC Tick Surveillance Data and Maps (2025)
expanded_surveillance_2015_2025.description: Latest multi-species county-level presence data (including Ixodes and Amblyomma americanum). Excellent source for updating 2025 purple tick layers.

expanded_surveillance_2015_2025.title: Lyme Disease Cases by County of Residence — United States, 2023
expanded_surveillance_2015_2025.description: County-level Lyme case data with downloadable CSV. Useful for extending the red layer time series and county-level detail.

expanded_surveillance_2015_2025.title: Climate Change Indicators: Lyme Disease (EPA)
expanded_surveillance_2015_2025.description: Long-term national and regional Lyme incidence trends tied to climate variables. Good supporting context.

new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.title: County-Level Distribution of Ixodes scapularis and Ixodes pacificus (Blacklegged and Western Blacklegged Ticks) — United States, 2015
new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.description: Updated national county-level maps for blacklegged ticks. Key for future Ixodes-focused purple layer expansion.

new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.title: CDC Tick Surveillance Data and Maps
new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.description: Latest 2025 county-level data for multiple tick species including Lone Star and blacklegged. Primary source for current purple blob updates.

new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.title: Lyme Disease Cases by County of Residence — United States, 2023
new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.description: County-level Lyme data. Used to expand red dots to many more states in testnet.

new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.title: Estimating the Frequency of Lyme Disease Diagnoses, United States, 2010–2018
new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.description: ~476,000 annual diagnoses estimate. Important context for underreporting disclaimers.

new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.title: Climate Change Indicators: Lyme Disease
new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.description: Long-term Lyme trends linked to climate. Useful for explanatory text.

new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.title: Johns Hopkins Lyme and Tickborne Diseases Dashboard
new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.authors: Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health
new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.description: Interactive county-level visualizations for validation and future features.

new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.title: Geographic Distribution of Suspected Alpha-gal Syndrome Cases — United States, 2017–2022
new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.description: Core Alpha-gal data source (already in use).

new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.title: Spatial Distribution of Counties With Records of Amblyomma americanum (Springer et al. 2014 references)
new_recommended_sources_for_expansion.description: Foundational historical Lone Star tick data for the purple layer.
